LSB-A1.note: All five sections present: Location Function, Visual Requirements, Logistics and Access, Permissions and Clearances, Potential Problems and Contingencies

LSB-A2.note: Visual requirements specify morning light for exterior texture, natural wear surfaces for walk-through, interview background with manageable clutter

LSB-A3.note: Two contingencies: access revoked (backup similar industrial location identified), insufficient interior light (relocate interview to exterior courtyard)

LSB-A1.note: All sections present though brief; appropriate for a single interview at a public park

LSB-A2.note: Specifies: pond as background, bench positioning for light direction, wind considerations for sound

LSB-A3.note: Two contingencies: bad weather (reschedule or move to sheltered spot) and unwanted background noise (position away from paths/playground)

LSB-A1.note: All sections present; BVG/Berlin Unterwelten access pathway identified; Denkmalschutz heritage protection addressed

LSB-A2.note: Specifies: portable LED essential for underground, Cold War-era preservation as visual asset, atmospheric shots require slow gimbal work; ambient sound assessment for underground acoustics

LSB-A3.note: Three contingencies: access restricted to certain areas (plan around confirmed zones), insufficient lighting for atmospheric shots (bring additional LED and reflectors), structural safety limits interview duration (prepare questions for shorter session)
